title: HAL trait extension for SX1302 multi-channel
description: Extend the Radio trait in lichen-hal/src/lib.rs to support multi-channel receive and CCP (Concentrator Chip Packet) metadata for SX1302 gateways. Mimic SX126x wrapper patterns from lichen-embassy. First subtask of SX1302 driver. Do not create new files.
close_reason: HAL Radio trait extended with current_channel default method mimicking SX126x; edited only lichen-hal/src/lib.rs; fmt/clippy/tests passed for package
